name: Deployment Config Agent
description: Generates deployment configuration: Docker Compose for dev, environment variable templates, CI/CD pipeline sketch, and cloud deployment checklist.

checks.pass: ✅ GitHub Actions directory found — CI/CD pipeline can be extended
checks.fail: ⚠️  No .github directory — CI/CD pipeline will be created from scratch

checks.prompt: Generate a deployment configuration plan for the enterprise skeleton: (1) Docker Compose services (app, db, cache), (2) 8 required environment variables with descriptions, (3) CI/CD pipeline stages (build, test, security-scan, deploy), (4) cloud deployment checklist (5 items). Context: {retryContext}
